wiki.summary: "NOT CUTE ANYMORE" is the title track of ILLIT's first single album. It doesn’t simply mean ‘not cute’; it means there are many aspects they haven’t shown yet beyond their cute side. ILLIT subverts expectations, rather than using their usual style, a catchy hook. They change it up to be a more laid back and chill song. The lyrics show their different side, they'd rather pick a unique drink, Kongguksu, rather than the popular Matcha. You'd think they'd pick the cute puppy, but they'd like the laid back jellyfish. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "NOT CUTE ANYMORE" is the title track of ILLIT's first single album. It doesn’t simply mean ‘not cute’; it means there are many aspects they haven’t shown yet beyond their cute side. ILLIT subverts expectations, rather than using their usual style, a catchy hook. They change it up to be a more laid back and chill song. The lyrics show their different side, they'd rather pick a unique drink, Kongguksu, rather than the popular Matcha. You'd think they'd pick the cute puppy, but they'd like the laid back jellyfish. You'd think they like cherry coke, or they would watch a calming movie when they're stressed. NOT CUTE ANYMORE shows the side they haven't shown. It shows their uniqueness — that they aren't just cute, they're way more than that, they can be cool, they can be introverted. ILLIT hopes people will say “not cute” — meaning that the public is recognizing this new, more mature, or more complex, different side of them. Read more on Last.fm.
